creator: Biodiversity Research Institute at University of Guelph
description: A biodiversity research institute publishes a 5-year species occurrence dataset from Mediterranean cork oak forests (12,847 records). They need researchers to discover this alongside related publications and environmental data—all through unified institutional search.

Research Impact: GBIF (Global Biodiversity Information Facility) automatically harvests this metadata; a climate researcher in Kenya discovers 12,847 Mediterranean species records relevant to her drought study—through proper DC metadata.
subject: Biodiversity
Cork Oak Forests
Mediterranean Ecosystems
Species Occurrence
title: 5-year species occurrence dataset from Mediterranean cork oak forests
